name: @metorial/persistiq
description: Manage sales outreach leads, campaigns, and engagement workflows. Create, list, and update leads (prospects) with custom fields, statuses, and ownership assignments. Create and delete outreach campaigns, add or remove leads from campaigns, and specify sending mailboxes. List team users for lead assignment. Manage Do Not Contact domain lists to maintain compliance. Retrieve lead statuses, lead fields, and prospect metadata including bounce, opt-out, reply counts, and sent history.
